privacy-policy-2.title: Privacy Policy
privacy-policy-2.content:
At [domain], we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.

1. Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of information:

  • Usage data (pages visited, time spent, etc.)

  • Device and browser data

  • IP address and location (approximate)

  • Any data you provide voluntarily (e.g., contact form)

2. How We Use Your Data

We use your information to:

  • Improve website functionality and performance

  • Display relevant offers or ads

  • Respond to your inquiries

  • Monitor traffic and usage trends

3. Third-Party Tools

We may use third-party services (such as Google Analytics or affiliate networks) which may place cookies on your device.

4. Cookies

Our website uses cookies to enhance user experience. You can disable cookies via your browser settings.

5. Data Security

We take reasonable steps to protect your information. However, no system is 100% secure.

6. Your Rights

You have the right to access, modify, or request deletion of your personal data.

7. Contact Us

For any questions regarding this privacy policy, contact us at:
📧 contact@[domain]

terms-and-conditions.title: Terms and Conditions
terms-and-conditions.content:
Welcome to [domain]. By accessing and using our website, you agree to the following terms and conditions:

1. Use of Website

You agree to use our website for lawful purposes only. Any misuse or attempt to harm the site is strictly prohibited.

2. Intellectual Property

All content, logos, and designs on this site are the property of ZamTech.top unless otherwise stated. You may not copy, reproduce, or distribute our content without written permission.

3. Affiliate Links

Some links on this website may be affiliate links. This means we may earn a small commission if you click and purchase through them, at no extra cost to you.

4. Accuracy of Information

While we strive to keep all information up-to-date and accurate, we do not guarantee completeness or reliability. Use the site at your own risk.

5. Limitation of Liability

[domain] is not responsible for any loss, damage, or inconvenience resulting from use of our website or any linked third-party service.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content:
The information provided on [domain] is for general informational purposes only.

  • We do not make any guarantees about the completeness, reliability, or accuracy of the content.

  • Any actions you take based on our website's content are strictly at your own risk.

  • We are not liable for any losses or damages related to the use of our website or the products/services we link to.

Note: Always do your own research before making a purchase.

affiliate-disclosure.title: Affiliate Disclosure
affiliate-disclosure.content:
Some links on [domain] are affiliate links. This means:

  • If you click a link and make a purchase, we may earn a commission.

  • This does not affect the price you pay.

  • These commissions help us maintain and improve the website.

As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.

We only promote products or services that we believe offer value to our visitors. Your trust is important to us, and we aim to be transparent about any commercial relationships we have.

cookies-policy.title: Cookies Policy
cookies-policy.content:
What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help enhance user experience and track website performance.

How We Use Cookies

  • Analyze traffic using Google Analytics

  • Remember your preferences

  • Serve personalized content or offers

  • Track affiliate link performance

Managing Cookies

You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling cookies may affect your browsing experience.

By continuing to use [domain], you agree to our use of cookies.

about-us.title: About Us
about-us.content:
Welcome to [domain] – Your Smart Shopping Partner! At [domain], we’re passionate about helping smart shoppers like you save money, time, and effort. Our mission is simple: to bring you the best online deals, exclusive discounts, and trusted recommendations from across the web – all in one place.

Who We Are

We’re a team of tech enthusiasts, deal hunters, and ecommerce experts who believe that great deals shouldn’t be hard to find. Whether you're looking for the latest gadgets, fashion must-haves, home essentials, or digital tools – ZamTech is here to guide your purchase decisions with confidence.

What We Do

  • ✅ Curate the Best Deals: Hand-picked offers from trusted platforms like Amazon, AliExpress, and more.
  • 🔍 Product Comparisons: Detailed comparisons to help you choose the right product at the right price.
  • 💬 Real Insights: Honest tips, guides, and reviews – no fluff, just value.
  • ⏰ Daily Updates: Our content is updated regularly to ensure you don’t miss limited-time deals.

Why Choose [domain]?

We’re not just another affiliate site. We’re here to be your trusted shopping companion, helping you cut through the noise and shop smarter. We value transparency, user trust, and practical advice over hype or pressure.

Contact Us

Got a question, suggestion, or business inquiry? 📧 Email us at: contact@[domain].com
